---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

<!--
Before opening:
- Check `docs/ROADMAP.md` — your idea may already be planned
- Search existing issues with the `enhancement` label
- For large architectural changes (multilingual embeddings, job-queue
  migration, multi-tenancy, ORM migration), please describe the
  approach here before investing weeks in a PR; alignment is cheaper
  than rework
-->

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who has this problem?
     A concrete user story or workflow is more persuasive than
     abstract framing.

     Example: "When triaging on mobile, I can't see the score
     dimensions without scrolling past the haiku" — beats "the mobile
     UI should be better". -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- What you'd like to see implemented. Sketches, mockups, or
     pseudo-code welcome. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why they don't fit as
     well. Acknowledging trade-offs is more persuasive than ignoring
     them. -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Links to similar features in other tools, related research
     papers, screenshots of mockups, prior discussion threads. -->

## Willing to Implement?

- [ ] I plan to open a PR for this
- [ ] I'd like to discuss approach first
- [ ] This is a request — I'm not planning to implement
